mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO item ( item_id, item_name, item_type, item_unit, item_spec, item_unit_price, item_whtype, item_usedate, item_safety_stock, item_usage ) VALUES (
'RAW' || raw_seq.NEXTVAL
'SEMI' || semi_seq.NEXTVAL
'FIN' || fin_seq.NEXTVAL
'ETC' || etc_seq.NEXTVAL
, #{itemName}, #{itemType}, upper(#{unit}), #{spec}, #{unitPrice}, #{itemWhType}, #{useDate}, #{safetyStock}, 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT I.item_id AS itemId, I.item_name AS itemName, I.item_type AS itemType, I.item_unit AS unit, I.item_spec AS spec, I.item_unit_price AS unitPrice, I.item_usedate AS useDate, I.item_safety_stock AS safetyStock, I.item_usage AS itemUsage, I.item_whtype AS itemWhType FROM item I WHERE I.item_id = #{itemId} AND I.item_usage = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE item SET item_name = #{itemName}, item_type = #{itemType}, item_unit = #{unit}, item_spec = #{spec}, item_unit_price = #{unitPrice}, item_whtype = #{itemWhType}, item_usedate = #{useDate}, item_safety_stock = #{safetyStock} WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT LOT_ID AS lotId, LOT_ITEM AS lotItem, LOT_VENDOR AS lotVendor, LOT_WORK AS lotWork, LOT_QTY AS lotQty, LOT_FQTY AS lotFqty, LOT_CQTY AS lotCqty, LOT_MFD AS lotMfd, LOT_ETW AS lotEtw, LOT_EXP AS lotExp, LOT_QC AS lotQc, LOT_STATUS AS lotStatus, LOT_MEMO AS lotMemo, LOT_BWHSEC AS lotBwhsec, LOT_AWHSEC AS lotAwhsec FROM LOT WHERE LOT_ITEM = #{itemId} ORDER BY LOT_ID DESC
